description: You are a projectionist at a drive-in theater preparing audio for an FM transmitter. Process the audio from /home/ga/Videos/action_trailer_raw_mix.mkv to ensure it sounds consistent on car radios by applying dynamic range compression to squash loud peaks and boost quiet parts. The output must be a Mono, 44100 Hz, 128 kbps MP3 saved to /home/ga/Music/fm_broadcast_audio.mp3. Document the output in a JSON specification log at /home/ga/Documents/fm_specs.json containing the keys 'filename' (string), 'channels' (integer), 'sample_rate' (integer), and 'compression_applied' (boolean true).
